case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. JANET SETO et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SETO, JANET

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SETO, JANET $4,505.05 PRINCIPAL, $717.09 INTEREST, $249.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,471.14, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
